intended_use: CT CoPilotTM is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable structures from sets of CT images of the brain. This software is intended to automate the cu
intended_use_full: CT CoPilotTM is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable structures from sets of CT images of the brain. This software is intended to automate the current manual process of identifying, labeling and quantifying structures identified on CT images of the brain and to provide automated registration and reformatting of data.
target_condition: Intracranial pathologies requiring volumetric quantification (e.g., ventricular enlargement, midline shift)
ground_truth: Expert manual segmentation by medical experts
other_metrics: Lateral Ventricle Volume correlation coefficient = 98%, Total CSF Volume correlation coefficient = 98%, Intracranial Volume correlation coefficient = 99%, Midline Shift Index correlation coefficient = 95%; Registration accuracy: inter-subject variability <15 degrees for yaw, roll, and pitch angles; Test-retest performance equivalent to expert manual segmentation
